titleStmt.title: SII 17.182: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 182. (A.R. No. 162 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀLAPPANDAL, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west base of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Madhyassthanāthēśvara temple.
VijaiyarājēndrachōḷaVide Annual Report on Indian Epigraphy for 1935, Para. 19.[Rajēndra III]. Year 11: 1256-57 A.D.

This seems to record the gift of land by Aḻagiyaśōḻaṉ alias Piridigaṅgaṉ alias Valandarumperumāḷ for the spring festival in the month of Vaikāśi to god Thirunāgīśuramuḍaiya Nāyaṉār. Taṉiniṉṟuveṉṟa Sēvagapperumāḷ is also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvicaiyarājentiracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉṉoṉṟāvatu Uṭaiyār tirunākicuramuṭaiyanāyaṉār
vaṟku tiruvaikāci vayantaṉ Eḻuntaruḷukaikku Aḻakiyacoḻaṉāṉa piritikaṅkaṉāṉa valan tarum perumāḷeṉ taṉiniṉṟuveṉṟa cevakapperumāḷ
ppaṭa viṭṭeṉ valantarum perumāḷeṉ
Digital edition of SII 17.182 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
